arts.ttl: Pep: Mourinho comment was a joke - he just wants Man City in League One
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has responded following Jose Mourinho's barbed comments that he won three Premier League titles "fairly and cleanly".

arts.ttl: Glasner on defensive progress and 'finisher' Mateta
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says his side have been working hard on their defensive progress this season, rewarded by their clean sheet at Portman Road - but that facing Manchester City will be one of their toughest tests of the season.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola fires back at old rival Jose Mourinho's 115 charges jibe
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola claims Jose Mourinho is just "another one on the huge list" who want to see Manchester City relegated because of their 115 Premier League charges

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner makes squad depth admission
arts.sum: The Austrian manager has been on record throughout the season that they saw the smaller squad size as an opportunity for players from the academy setup. “I think it was the right decision because maybe Justin Devenny wouldn’t have gotten the chance, and he’s been excellent,” said Glasner.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola claims Jose Mourinho wants Man City to be RELEGATED... as he fires back at his rival after Portuguese made dig about winning his Premier League titles 'fairly'
arts.sum: The Portuguese held up three fingers near the end of his Manchester United reign in 2018 in response to mounting criticism. And Guardiola said: 'Maybe we are similar, but he won three and I won six.'

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace tipped to land potential new Olise for £20m as director speaks out on January sale
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are keen on the winger...

arts.ttl: Storm Darragh deluge can't stop Man City vs Crystal Palace as three players send message
arts.sum: Manchester City began the defence of the FA Youth Cup with a third-round clash vs Crystal Palace at the Academy Stadium.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola challenges fan in the street: "Do you know what is lost?"
arts.sum: During the City's Champions League match against Feyenoord, Pep's team was leading by three goals, but they ultimately ended up tying the game 3-3. At the end of the match, the Spanish coach had scratches on his head and later declared that he harmed himself out of frustration.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City scouts identify €100M Rodri replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City scouts have pinpointed Valencia midfielder Pepelu as the ideal man to replace Rodri as the Spaniard recovers from his ACL injury, FootballTransfers has been told. The Denia-born player featured in almost every match of La Liga last season, playing 3,215 minutes across 36 of the 38 games.

arts.ttl: Laura Blindkilde Brown's Man City progress explained by Gareth Taylor after England debut
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Gareth Taylor reflects on Laura Blindkilde Brown's progress after she made her senior England debut this week.
